_fixture_source: AlarmsTable.jsx alarmsData (lines 5-30): dateTime, stationName, alertType, alertDescription; plan uses alarmCode enum instead of English strings
_divergences: AlarmsTable uses 'alertType' string ('Comm Alert', 'GPS Alert', 'Enclosure Door Open Alert') — plan uses 'alarmCode' enum (COMM_LOST, GPS_LOST, DOOR_OPEN)
AlarmsTable uses 'alertDescription' free-text string — plan returns structured 'alarmDetails' JSON
AlarmsTable uses 'stationName' display string — API returns 'sourceId' (FK to station/buoy id)
AlarmsTable uses 'dateTime' string format '10-05-2026, 12:00:00' — API returns ISO 'raisedAt' datetime
